title: git-ai project config
description: Optional settings in .git-ai/config.json at the git repository root.

$schema.description: JSON Schema URL or path for editor validation.

baseBranch.description: Default base branch for create-pr / update-pr diff and PR target.

diffIgnore.description: Extra .gitignore-style patterns omitted from AI diffs. Merged with .git-ai/diff-ignore and built-in lockfile defaults.

conventions.description: Repo-relative path to commit/branch conventions markdown. Null uses .git-ai/conventions.md or the bundled default.

prTemplate.description: Repo-relative path to the pull request template markdown.

stagedFix.description: Optional lint/format commands run before commit. Executes arbitrary shell from the repository root.

ai.description: AI request settings for OpenAI-compatible providers.

maxTokens.description: Override max_tokens for every mode unless maxTokensByMode sets a mode-specific value.

maxTokensByMode.description: Per-mode max_tokens overrides. Keys: branch-commit-pr, branch-commit-push, commit-push, create-pr, update-pr.

reasoning.description: Reasoning / thinking level for OpenAI-compatible providers.

reasoningProfile.description: Override reasoning request encoding. Default: auto-detect from OPENAI_BASE_URL host; unknown hosts use compatible (OpenRouter + DeepSeek fields).

paths.description: .gitignore-style path patterns. Command runs when any staged file matches.

command.description: Shell command executed from the repository root (sh -c).
